creator: simon@olofsson.de
text:
Stanislav,

I tested the port once again and the extension works with Firefox like
it should.
The installed files are under:
/usr/local/lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org
I don't think you need XPI_FILES, if you have pkg-plist.
I'm not sure why this didn't work for you.

Regards
Simon
